text.title: API Contract-First Workflow Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a API Contract-First Workflow artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo dev launches a public REST API. Writes the OpenAPI doc first, runs spectral + oasdiff in CI, and ships generated TypeScript + Python SDKs alongside the server.

list.item: Source-of-truth refs: ≥1 verifiable URL + ≥1 dashboard or transcript reference.
Triggering activity matches AGENTS.md 'Applies If' list (ALL items hold).
Step 1 — `prerequisites_ok=true`; all refs reachable and citable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
